nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联312种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等312种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bruce Beehler
nodes.summary: Bruce Beehler是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Moluccan king parrot、黄额园丁鸟、Wattled smoky honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Moluccan king parrot
nodes.summary: Moluccan king parrot（Moluccan king parrot，学名 Alisterus amboinensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于新幾內亞島、Bruce Beehler，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: left|thumb|At Brevard Zoo The Moluccan king parrot inhabits rainforests, but sometimes enters nearby plantations and gardens. Exceptionally, it occurs at altitude up to 2100 m, but more commonly below 1200 m (New Guinea){{cite book|author=Beehler, B., T

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: left|thumb|At Brevard Zoo The Moluccan king parrot inhabits rainforests, but sometimes enters nearby plantations and gardens. Exceptionally, it occurs at altitude up to 2100 m, but more commonly below 1200 m (New Guinea){{cite book|author=Beehler, B., T

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Zimmerman|title=Birds of New Guinea|publisher=Princeton University Press|year=1986|isbn=0-691-08385-1|page=122}} or 1600 m (Maluku). It is generally uncommon due to habitat loss and capture for the parrot trade, but remains locally common at least on the Sula Islands, Halmahera, and Buru. Overall, the species is not believed to be in immediate danger, and consequently is listed as least concern by BirdLife International and IUCN. As most parrots, the Moluccan king parrot is listed in Appendix II of CITES
